Do not run adaptive search without a usable feedback signal or carryover policy.

design_notes: Edge families are governed composition seeds derived from the pairwise Paradigm Interaction Matrix. They express recurrent cross-paradigm operator roles, not an exhaustive closed inventory of every future interaction.

The relation_role field is intentionally coarse. It classifies the structural role of the interaction; the operator_family and operator_family_code fields carry the more specific mechanism family for that edge slot.

The requires/provides artifact types and default validation requirements are seed-level expectations that help downstream users start from a coherent contract. They may need strengthening, narrowing, or adaptation in concrete tasks.

The relation_role vocabulary is governed but revisable across releases. It is a current coarse structural classification, not an exhaustive permanent inventory. The operator_family field carries the more specific recurrent mechanism seed and is likewise open to revision through governance.
